name: neural-weights-en-us

training.recipe: v0.6.0/v0.6.1 base + corpus rebalance: synth-street weight 2.0→0.5, NEW synth-no-street source @ 1.0 (122K rows: 112K US + 10K DE/GB, 35% venue-adversarial). CE-only (CRF deferred to v0.6.3 per NaN protocol; fp32-CRF diagnostic 2026-05-28 confirmed bf16 NaN fix). lr=1.5e-4 constant, warmup=1000.

upstream_changes_from_v0.6.0: Reduced synth-street source weight 2.0 → 0.5 to suppress decompose-mode bias.
Added synth-no-street source @ weight 1.0 — 122K rows (112K US + 10K DE/GB).

35% of synth-no-street rows are 'venue-adversarial': venues whose names contain street-typing tokens (e.g. '5th Avenue Theatre', 'Wall Street Industries'), with explicit B-venue labels on tokens like 'Street'/'Avenue'/'Drive'.
Bilingual slice (DE/GB) gives non-US anti-decompose signal. Synthetic plausible postcodes; model trains on shape, not on locality↔postcode geocoder-truth.
intended_use: US, FR, and US/GB/DE address parsing. Non-US locales beyond GB/DE/FR still have coverage gaps — see v0-vs-neural-harness eval for per-locale pass rates.
